---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0006
alias: helios_backfill_intake_audit
issued_on: 2025-12-18
total_eur: 520
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 260
    line_eur: 520
---
# Helios intake audit invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0006                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_intake_audit   |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-18                     |
| total_eur      | 520                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit | 2   | 260      | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                             |     |          | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from the first phase when the work was mostly diagnosis and process-mapping.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request. I OCR-structured `50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md` by adding invoice YAML frontmatter per finance schema and preserved the full original note body verbatim below the frontmatter. Then I deleted the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS files for entered folders, applied finance schema for OCR migration, preserved exact original body under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox file explicitly requested OCR frontmatter extraction for one invoice note. The target note contained all required invoice fields and line item data visible in the body, enabling a complete schema-compliant update. Successful write and subsequent inbox deletion match process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
